warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills: 5-8min
1 round:
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Broad Jumps
2 Rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
3 Full Snatch
5 OH Squat
0530 specific warm up
10m calf walks
10 Band Row, Rotate, Press
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
2 mins double under practice

strength.name: Power Snatch
strength.description:
1x3 | 1x3
E2MOM 12min
Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Keep them clean.

10:00 3

strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
4x6 | * 3 sec Down, 2 sec Pause
*Keep Quads engaged at all times.
*Think Break & Pull apart Bar | E3MOM 18 mins
BUILD 2x6
00:00 6 @ 50%
03:00 6 @ 60%
HOLD 4x6
06:00 6 @ 65%
09:00 6 @ 65%
12:00 6 @ 65%
15:00 6 @ 65%

hypertrophy.reasoning: Address pulling patterns and posterior chain balance while sparing snatches, pressing, and metcon-fatigued lower body.

CrossFit Games Open 11.1 and 14.1 | 10-Minute AMRAP of:
30 Double-Unders
15 Power Snatches, 75# / 55#
siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Power Snatch, 1 by 3. Strength: Bench Press, 4 by 6 at 65 percent. Metcon: CrossFit Games Open 11.1 and 14.1. AMRAP 10 minutes: 30 Double-Unders, 15 Power Snatches, 75# / 55#. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
